caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs in front of a beige slatted backdrop. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with blue floral embroidery, and a red and white beaded necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a stand and plays an acoustic guitar. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to sing into the microphone while strumming his guitar, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he performs. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a consistent medium shot of the performer and the audience's heads throughout the clip.
